company_summary: HealthEdge provides cloud-based software solutions for health insurance payers, including its core administrative processing platform (HealthRules Payor) and acquired products like Burgess, Wellframe, and Source. The company is focused on modernising legacy insurance infrastructure with SaaS-based core administration, payment integrity, and care management tools. Backed by Blackstone, HealthEdge is on a growth trajectory targeting digital transformation for health plans.
fit_indicators: HealthEdge modernises legacy insurance infrastructure with SaaS platforms — Sudheer has 4 years of direct legacy modernisation experience at RNTBCI converting monolithic systems to microservices
Role likely involves internal tooling and workflow products for payer operations — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval systems used daily across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi orgs
HealthEdge products involve identity and access for enterprise health plan clients — Sudheer implemented OKTA authentication in enterprise Java systems at RNTBCI
AI product integration is a growing initiative at HealthEdge (Wellframe care management, AI-assisted workflows) — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems using Claude API

PM intern role at a SaaS company requires technical credibility to work with engineering — Sudheer's 4 years of full-stack Java/Spring Boot experience enables direct collaboration with engineering teams

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Group PM
contact_targets.function: Product Management — HealthRules Payor or Wellframe team
contact_targets.reason: Direct manager or peer of the intern role; best person to speak to day-to-day work, team fit, and project scope

contact_targets.title: Associate Product Manager or PM II
contact_targets.reason: Recently hired IC doing similar work; can give authentic ground-level insight into the intern experience and team culture

contact_targets.title: University Recruiter or Talent Acquisition Partner
contact_targets.reason: Fallback contact to confirm application status and signal strong interest if PM team contacts are unresponsive
